tools.name: search_properties
tools.description: Conversational property search at Loft. Pass the user's message exactly - the system handles filter extraction and may ask follow-up questions. Use session_id from previous responses to maintain conversation context. The response includes assistant_message (always show this first), properties (if found), and suggestions (quick reply options).

tools.name: get_property_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific property.
